channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FedEx sues Trump administration for full tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruling on IEEPA
item.description: FedEx sues U.S. government for tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruled Trump's emergency trade duties on imports were unlawful.

item.title: The Business Case For Prioritizing The Human Side Of AI
item.description: Organizations that see productivity gains are thinking about people changes alongside process changes.

item.title: Uber ‘Autonomous Solutions’ Reveals Their Strategy, Is It Enough?
item.description: Uber wants to provide all the many other ingredients of self-driving beyond the vehicle, including of course the ride hail

item.title: Northern Lights Forecast: 10 States Could See Aurora Tuesday Night
item.description: NOAA is forecasting elevated solar wind conditions on Tuesday, Feb. 24, through Wednesday, Feb 25, with the aurora borealis possible in northern U.S. ...

item.title: AI Is Making Us Less Creative, But There’s A Fix
item.description: A new study says AI is making people less creative. But is that due to our over-dependance on AI, or to mistakes in how we're using it?

item.title: ‘The state of our union is more indebted than ever’: Budget watchdog continues war of words with Trump White House
item.description: The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget took heat over the weekend, with Scott Bessent saying its leader “should be ashamed.”

item.title: The workplace benefit 95% of workers want but aren’t satisfied with is a pretty basic one: bereavement leave, study shows
item.description: Research from Empathy’s 2026 Workplace Benefits Report, shared exclusively with Fortune, underscores a “clear gap” between what workers need what empl...

item.title: Trump is set to throw another tariff tantrum at the state of the union. Economists know better
item.description: Trump calls himself "Tariff Man" and is moving to pull another rabbit out of his hat. Don't be confused.

item.title: Amazon’s AWS Debuts AI Tool That Automates Clipping Live Sports For Social Media
item.description: AWS launches Elemental Inference tools to automate finding, clipping, adding metadata and distributing vertical video highlights from live sports even...

item.title: Self-defense company finds major benefits after moving manufacturing from overseas to US
item.description: Byrna Technologies CEO Bryan Ganz moved manufacturing from South Africa to Indiana before President Donald Trump's tariffs, saying the company "correc...

item.title: Gen Z’s enthusiasm for all things touchable is resurrecting the analog economy—and costing parents
item.description: Live Nation had its biggest year yet for concert attendance. Print book sales are at a record high. The vinyl record industry has enjoyed a resurrecti...

item.title: How one AI company is helping businesses navigate Trump’s new tariff chaos following the Supreme Court ruling
item.description: Plus a chaotic AI Impact Summit wraps up in India and Anthropic accuses Chinese rivals of using Claude's answers to train their own models

item.title: President Donald Trump could use his address Tuesday to unveil a retirement plan
Consumers are less pessimistic about the U.S. economy than previously thought
10 stocks Wall Street expects to roar back after big declines this year
Struggling with income-tax questions? Sign up now for Don’t Short Yourself Live.
Nasdaq leading stocks higher in final hour as AI-disruption fears ease — live
Florida Chamber CEO says high-tax states are in a ‘death spiral’ as $4M-an-hour wealth migration accelerates
item.description: If Florida was a stock, the state's Chamber of Commerce CEO Mark Wilson "would be investing everything" in it as he details the Sunshine State's plans...

item.title: American homebuyers gain most purchasing power since 2022
item.description: Homebuyers' purchasing power rose over $30,300 in past year as median-income households can now afford $331,483 homes with mortgage payments 8.4% lowe...

item.title: Trump Organization signs deal for billion-dollar skyscraper on Australia's Gold Coast
item.description: The Trump Organization announced a $1 billion project in Australia last week, building a 91-floor luxury resort and apartments on the Gold Coast.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
